118 M5A M5A_RELIEF_CHAIR 34a(M5a)Pressure Relieving Device(s) for Chair CHAR 1 Indicates the patient has received pressure relieving device(s) for the chair to manage skin problems in the past seven days. Includes gel, air, or other cushioning placed on a chair or wheelchair. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
